class.name: rviz_custom_panel/VehicleMetricsPanel
class.description: Display vehicle speed, battery, and auto/manual status.

class.name: rviz_custom_panel/VehicleExtrasPanel
class.description: Display localization covariance and EKF stats.

class.name: rviz_custom_panel/VehicleDriversPanel
class.description: Monitor driver and module health based on message frequencies.
